title: OpenClaw Dashboard - Feature List V2 (Control Center Integration)

features.name: Enhanced Overview Page (总览)
features.description: Enhanced overview page with system status, pending items, risks, staff busy status, and operational summary
steps: Add pending items card showing approvals, exceptions, action queue
Add risks section with budget risks, stalled executions, system alerts
Add staff busy status showing who's working vs standby
Add operational summary with key metrics
Integrate with approval actions and exception streams
features.notes: Implemented with pending items, risks, staff status, and search

features.name: Usage/Cost Page (用量)
features.description: New usage page showing token consumption attribution, cost trends, subscription window, and quota usage
steps: Create usage page with today/7day/30day trends
Add token consumption attribution by task/agent
Add cost analysis with burn rate
Add subscription window and quota tracking
Integrate with CODEX_HOME and subscription snapshot
features.notes: Created with mock data, ready for API integration

features.name: Staff Page (员工)
features.description: New staff page showing who is actually working vs on standby, recent output, and scheduling status
steps: Create staff page with live execution status
Show current processing item vs next item
Display recent output and productivity metrics

features.name: Enhanced Tasks Page (任务)
features.description: Enhanced tasks page with task board, scheduling, approvals, execution chain, and execution evidence
steps: Add task board with project mapping
Add approvals queue with approve/reject actions
Add execution evidence from session data
features.notes: Created with status/priority filtering and search

features.name: Enhanced Documents Page (文档)
features.description: Enhanced documents page as source file workspace based on active agents from openclaw.json
steps: Show shared documents and agent-specific docs
Add file editing with direct source file write-back
Filter by active agents only (don't show deleted agents)
features.notes: Direct file I/O, no stale copies

features.name: Enhanced Memory Page (记忆)
features.description: Enhanced memory page as workspace based on active agents from openclaw.json
steps: Read agent list from openclaw.json for filtering
Show daily memory and long-term memory
Add memory editing with direct source file write-back
Add semantic search with LanceDB integration
features.notes: Enhance existing memory page with file I/O and agent filtering

features.name: Enhanced Settings Page (设置)
features.description: Enhanced settings page with security modes, connector status, and data pipeline expectations
steps: Show which data sources are connected vs degraded
features.notes: Show explicit 'not connected' states instead of fake zeros

features.name: Runtime Files Integration
features.description: Integrate with runtime files (projects.json, tasks.json, budgets.json, etc.)
steps: Create runtime file reader for projects.json
Create runtime file reader for tasks.json
Create runtime file reader for budgets.json
Add acks.json support for action queue
features.notes: Created runtime-reader.ts with all file types

features.name: OpenClaw.json Integration
features.description: Read openclaw.json to get active agent roster for filtering
steps: Display agent roster in staff page

features.name: Subscription/Codex Integration
features.description: Integrate with CODEX_HOME and subscription snapshot for usage data
steps: Support alternative providers (API keys, OpenAI, etc.)

features.name: Approval Actions System
features.description: Implement approval actions with approve/reject functionality

features.name: Search API Integration
features.description: Integrate with search APIs for tasks, projects, sessions, exceptions
steps: Add safe substring search for each entity type
Add search to dedicated search page if needed
features.notes: Safe search only, no injection risks

features.name: Bilingual Support (Chinese/English)
features.description: Add Chinese/English language support throughout dashboard

features.name: Replay Index Page
features.description: Add replay/debug index for timeline, digest, export, bundle
steps: Integrate with runtime digests and exports

features.name: UI Polish - Pixel-Office Style
features.description: Polish UI to match Mission Control v3 pixel-office style
steps: Update card styles to Apple-like层次
Add proper text wrapping for long titles
